query: Show me pediatric facilities in Pune.

recommendation.name: Surya Mother and Child Super Speciality Hospital
recommendation.reason: Highly trusted pediatric specialty hospital with verified pediatricians and fully equipped NICU/PICU.

reasoning.text: Searched for facilities with pediatric specialties in Pune.
Flagged a general clinic claiming 15 unrelated specialties including complex pediatric surgery.
Recommended Surya Super Speciality Hospital as it meets all IPHS guidelines for specialized pediatric care.

warnings.name: City Health PolyClinic
warnings.reason: Claims pediatric surgery alongside 14 other surgical specialties, but lists only 1 general practitioner. Peer anomaly: >95th percentile for claimed specialties vs similar clinics.
